title: PCC Panels
shortDesc: Main distribution panels engineered for reliable power control in large industrial and commercial facilities.

title: MCC Panels
shortDesc: Centralised motor control solutions with intelligent protection, monitoring, and switching capabilities.

title: APFC Panels
shortDesc: Automated capacitor bank systems that maintain optimal power factor and reduce energy losses.

title: PLC Panels
shortDesc: Custom-engineered PLC panels built for precise process control, data acquisition, and system integration.

title: VFD Panels
shortDesc: Drive panels for variable speed motor control delivering energy savings, soft start, and precise process control.

title: Servo Panels
shortDesc: High-precision servo drive enclosures for position, velocity, and torque control in motion applications.
